description: The side-scroller flip convention: sets the sign of entity.scaleX from horizontal velocity so a side-view sprite faces the way it moves (moving right = scaleX positive, left = negative). The renderer honors a negative scaleX as a horizontal flip (0.3.2), so this just wires that to motion. Preserves the scale magnitude and holds facing below a threshold (a stopped sprite keeps its last facing). Distinct from face-angle, which rotates; this only mirrors left/right. Visual only. Order it after the mover.

invert.description: Set true when the art faces LEFT by default (default false = faces right).
